complaints.subject: Focus knob stuck on Model X200
complaints.description: The coarse focus knob stopped turning after 2 weeks of use. Cannot focus on slides properly.

complaints.subject: Dim light output on LabPro 400
complaints.description: LED illumination has become very dim compared to when first purchased. Already tried replacing bulb setting.

complaints.subject: Stage drift on digital microscope
complaints.description: The motorized stage drifts slowly during time-lapse imaging. Calibration was done last month.

complaints.subject: Software not recognizing camera
complaints.description: QuasmoView software fails to detect the attached camera after Windows update. USB connection is fine.

complaints.subject: Condenser alignment issue
complaints.description: Condenser is misaligned and I cannot center it using the knobs. Purchased 3 months ago.

complaints.subject: Objective lens scratch
complaints.description: 40x objective appears to have a scratch. Images show a permanent artifact. Need replacement or repair.

complaints.subject: Power button unresponsive
complaints.description: Unit sometimes does not power on. Have to try multiple times. Intermittent issue.

complaints.subject: Warranty claim - damaged in shipping
complaints.description: Box arrived with visible damage. Microscope base has a crack. Requesting replacement under warranty.

complaints.subject: Request for calibration certificate
complaints.description: Need a new calibration certificate for our annual ISO audit. Unit was calibrated 11 months ago.

complaints.subject: Eyepiece fogging
complaints.description: Eyepieces fog up during long sessions. Room humidity is controlled. Wondering if there is a seal issue.

complaints.subject: Stage clip broken
complaints.description: The spring-loaded stage clip broke. Need a replacement part. Model X200.

complaints.subject: USB 3.0 connection drops
complaints.description: Camera connection drops every few minutes when using USB 3.0. Works stable on USB 2.0 but slower.

complaints.subject: Uneven illumination field
complaints.description: The illumination is noticeably brighter on the right side. Köhler alignment did not fix it.

complaints.subject: Dust inside objective
complaints.description: Visible dust or debris inside the 10x objective. Affecting image quality. Unit is under warranty.

complaints.subject: Software license key invalid
complaints.description: After reinstalling QuasmoView, the license key is rejected. Key was valid before reinstall.

complaints.subject: Request spare parts list
complaints.description: Need a list of available spare parts and consumables for LabPro 400 for our lab inventory.

complaints.subject: Filter wheel stuck
complaints.description: The fluorescence filter wheel does not turn. It was working last week.

complaints.subject: Image stitching not working
complaints.description: Panorama/stitching feature in QuasmoView fails with an error. Single capture works fine.

complaints.subject: Base wobble
complaints.description: Microscope base is not stable on the bench. Slight wobble when adjusting focus. All feet are in contact.

complaints.subject: Overheating after 2 hours
complaints.description: LED module becomes very hot and the unit shuts down after about 2 hours of continuous use.
